roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/NP//X: DEFENDANT UNABLE TO BE TRANSPORTED DUE TO QUARENTINE-COVID/X:DEFENDANTENTERS PLEA IN ABSENTIA/X:ADVISEMENT OF RIGHTS, WAIVER AND PLEA FORM FILED/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATIONS 2 & 3 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ: 50 DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 27DAYS,/4019HALF/X:THE COURT DISMISSES REMAINING VIOLATIONS /X:PAROLE REINSTATED WITHTIME LOSS /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
